title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 26 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 26 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 26 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher, futures tight by0.44% in the day. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
